title: AlphaFold-derived local structural confidence in BRCA1 missense variant interpretation: a ClinVar-based computational analysis
description: A reproducible computational analysis pipeline for integrating ClinVar BRCA1 missense variants with Ensembl VEP annotations, AlphaFold-derived local structural confidence values, and UniProt domain annotations. The v1.0.0 release includes the software pipeline and the generated master table.
notes: Code is released under the MIT License. Generated result files, including results/tables/master.tsv, are released under CC0 1.0 Universal as specified in LICENSE-DATA.md. A manuscript with the same title is planned but has not yet been submitted for publication.
